description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a white perimeter fence and featuring a large, rectangular green lawn. The structure has a flat roof and a combination of white and stone-textured exterior walls, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. A paved driveway leads to the main entrance, and a spacious backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool set into the lawn. The layout is open and linear, with the living spaces oriented toward the backyard and pool area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, stone and white exterior, large windows, and a backyard pool within a fenced lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, and a partial view of the backyard pool and lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large glass doors, expansive backyard lawn, and the full swimming pool.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, lawn, and the linear arrangement of rooms along the side facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway extending to the side and the rear portion of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and windows facing the backyard
